name: Halliburton Company
description: Halliburton Company is one of the world's largest providers of products and services to the energy industry. Founded in 1919, the company creates innovative technologies, products, and services that help customers maximize their value throughout the life cycle of an asset and advance a sustainable energy future. Halliburton operates in two main business segments: Completion and Production, and Drilling and Evaluation, serving major oil and natural gas companies worldwide.
